title: Resolve gems through Bundler and commit the lock
description: Declare gems in the Gemfile and pin the resolved graph in Gemfile.lock so every environment runs identical versions.
body: Use when adding or upgrading a gem in an application. Do not gem install ad hoc or run bundle update on deploy. Actions: declare the dependency in the Gemfile with a pessimistic constraint (~>) matching your support policy, let bundler resolve and write Gemfile.lock, commit both files, and run bundle install (honoring the lock) in CI and deploy. Validation signals include a CI step that runs bundle install --deployment and verifies no lock drift. Risk boundary: resolving at deploy time runs untested gem versions in production; an uncommitted Gemfile.lock for an application is a reproducibility defect. A gem library intentionally omits the lock so consumers resolve fresh.
